nodes.label: Prefer Serverless Form Endpoints
nodes.author: Shafiq Hammad
nodes.rationale: Most users no longer use PHP servers; a universal serverless form API works with all hosting, SSG, and frameworks.

nodes.label: Design System
nodes.author: Your Name
nodes.rationale: A design system is more than a component library; it is a shared language between design and engineering that scales across projects without forked copies.

nodes.label: Technical SEO
nodes.author: Your Name
nodes.rationale: Technical SEO is the foundation: clean semantics, fast loads, and accurate metadata get most of the way there.

nodes.label: Astro
nodes.author: Your Name
nodes.rationale: Ship static, content-focused websites without a heavy JavaScript runtime; components render to HTML by default and only hydrate where interactivity is needed.

nodes.label: Plain-language product explainer
nodes.rationale: Marketing site explains a complex product in plain language; identity rebuilt from the ground up.
